interactions.mechanism: Both inhibit platelet function and increase bleeding risk
interactions.clinical_recommendation: Avoid combination. If necessary, monitor INR closely.

interactions.mechanism: NSAIDs inhibit platelet aggregation and may displace warfarin
interactions.clinical_recommendation: Avoid. Use paracetamol if pain relief needed.

interactions.mechanism: Risk of lactic acidosis with iodinated contrast
interactions.clinical_recommendation: Hold metformin 48 hours before contrast procedures.
Avoid combination. Monitor for serotonin syndrome signs.

interactions.mechanism: Antacids reduce ciprofloxacin absorption by chelation
interactions.clinical_recommendation: Separate administration by at least 2 hours.

kidney disease.mechanism: Nephrotoxic or renally cleared drugs dangerous in kidney disease
kidney disease.clinical_recommendation: Avoid or adjust dose. Monitor kidney function closely.

liver disease.mechanism: Hepatotoxic drugs dangerous in liver disease
liver disease.clinical_recommendation: Avoid high doses. Monitor liver enzymes.

heart failure.mechanism: Can worsen heart failure or cause fluid retention
